description: You are a Regional Maintenance Director responsible for facilities across multiple sites. A severe overnight storm caused damage to three of your buildings. Using OpenMaint (login: admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/), create and manage emergency work orders. Create three new corrective maintenance work orders: Building 1 requires a 'Critical' priority order for 'Roof membrane breach — active water intrusion into 4th floor electrical room' (Code: WO-STORM-001); Building 2 requires a 'High' priority order for 'HVAC rooftop unit displacement — condenser fan housing cracked, unit non-operational' (Code: WO-STORM-002); and Building 3 requires a 'Medium' priority order for 'Parking garage lighting circuit failure — 60% of garage level B1 lights out after power surge' (Code: WO-STORM-003). Update the status of work order 'WO-PRE-RESOLVED' to 'Closed' or 'Completed'. Do not modify work order 'WO-CONTAM-001' as it belongs to a different maintenance campaign. A damage assessment summary is available at /home/ga/Desktop/storm_damage_report.txt.
